name: Pancakes/Guest Chef 1h16
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together into a bowl.
2. In another bowl, combine the egg, oil, and milk.
3. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until the batter is just smooth.
4. Grease a large skillet or griddle lightly.
5. When the skillet is hot, ladle the batter onto it (usually 3 pancakes fit in a large skillet).
6. Adjust the heat to medium-high.
7. Cook the pancakes until bubbles appear on the surface of each pancake, which usually takes about 2 to 3 minutes.
8. Using a spatula, lift one pancake and check that the underside is browned.
9. Turn the pancake over and cook the other side until it is browned, about 1 1/2 to 2 minutes.
